description: Single-module Maven project: plain Java + a Kotlin file, four planted defects; network bridge so Qodana auto-downloads projectJDK 17. Shape guards (tool driver, qodanaSeverity, DuplicatedCode exact count) over one SARIF.

expectations.reason: STARTING-GUESS id: planted `a == b` on String must surface; pin exact id from CI control run.
STARTING-GUESS id: planted empty catch must surface; pin exact id from CI control run.
STARTING-GUESS id+count: two identical methods must yield an exact, non-doubled, non-zero DuplicatedCode count; pin id and exact count from CI control run.

STARTING-GUESS id: an always-true `name != null` on a non-null val must report a Kotlin constant-condition inspection; pin the EXACT rule id (KotlinConstantConditions vs a profile-specific variant) and confirm it is enabled in THIS image's default profile from the CI control run — do not trust the guess.
